name: bootstrap
description: Scaffold and realign repositories to the Patina Project baseline.

interface.shortDescription: Scaffold and realign repos to the Patina Project baseline
interface.longDescription: Emit the Patina Project repository baseline into a new or existing repo. Covers commits, PRs, PNPM tooling, agent docs, and plugin surfaces for every supported AI coding tool. Realigns existing repos with the current baseline on rerun.
defaultPrompt: Use $bootstrap to scaffold this new repository to the Patina Project baseline.
Use $bootstrap to realign this existing repository with the latest baseline.
Use $bootstrap to add currently-supported AI platform surfaces to this agent plugin.
